tasks.label: [W] 🟢 Start Engine — Launches the trading engine in background
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  Start the RBOTZILLA trading engine as a background process.' && echo '  It will begin scanning pairs and placing trades autonomously.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) bash scripts/start.sh ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited — no changes made.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled — engine NOT started.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [W] 🔴 Stop Engine — Kills the running engine process
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  Kill the running trading engine process.' && echo '  All open trades remain on OANDA broker but will no longer' && echo '  be managed (no trailing, no green-lock, no stagnation).' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) bash scripts/stop.sh ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited — no changes made.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled — engine still running.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [W] 🔄 Restart Engine — Stops then starts the engine (no code changes)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  1. Kill the running engine process' && echo '  2. Re-launch with current .env config (unchanged)' && echo '  3. Re-sync all broker positions' && echo '  NO code or config is modified. Open trades remain on OANDA.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) bash scripts/restart.sh ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited — no changes made.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled — engine unchanged.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [W] 🔥 Insert Phoenix ENV — Swaps .env to Phoenix config (auto-backup + rollback)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  1. AUTO-BACKUP current .env with timestamp' && echo '  2. SWAP .env → .env.phoenix (Phoenix settings)' && echo '  3. Restart engine with Phoenix config' && echo '' && echo '  CHANGES: Higher confidence gate, Phoenix position sizing,' && echo '  profit extraction mode. NO CODE IS MODIFIED.' && echo '' && echo '  ROLLBACK: Run "Restore Clean ENV" task to undo.' && echo '  Backup saved to: logs/env_rollback/' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) mkdir -p logs/env_rollback && cp .env "logs/env_rollback/.env.backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)" && echo "✅ Rollback point saved: logs/env_rollback/.env.backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)" && cp .env.phoenix .env && echo '✅ .env swapped to Phoenix config' && bash scripts/restart.sh ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited — no changes made.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled — .env unchanged.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [W] 🛡️ Insert Safe ENV — Swaps .env to conservative config (auto-backup + rollback)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  1. AUTO-BACKUP current .env with timestamp' && echo '  2. SWAP .env → .env.safe (conservative settings)' && echo '  3. Restart engine with Safe config' && echo '' && echo '  CHANGES: Tighter gates, smaller positions, profit target ON.' && echo '  NO CODE IS MODIFIED.' && echo '' && echo '  ROLLBACK: Run "Restore Clean ENV" task to undo.' && echo '  Backup saved to: logs/env_rollback/' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) mkdir -p logs/env_rollback && cp .env "logs/env_rollback/.env.backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)" && echo "✅ Rollback point saved" && cp .env.safe .env && echo '✅ .env swapped to Safe config' && bash scripts/restart.sh ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited — no changes made.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled — .env unchanged.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [W] ♻️ Restore Clean ENV — Restores master .env from Desktop backup + restarts
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  1. AUTO-BACKUP current .env with timestamp' && echo '  2. RESTORE .env from Desktop master clean backup' && echo '  3. Restart engine with original clean config' && echo '' && echo '  This undoes any Phoenix/Safe/experimental ENV swap.' && echo '  NO CODE IS MODIFIED.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && if [ ! -f ~/Desktop/RBOTZILLA_ENV_CLEAN_MASTER.env ]; then echo '  ❌ ERROR: Master backup not found at ~/Desktop/RBOTZILLA_ENV_CLEAN_MASTER.env' && echo '  Run: cp .env ~/Desktop/RBOTZILLA_ENV_CLEAN_MASTER.env' && exit 1; fi && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) mkdir -p logs/env_rollback && cp .env "logs/env_rollback/.env.backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)" && echo '✅ Rollback point saved' && cp ~/Desktop/RBOTZILLA_ENV_CLEAN_MASTER.env .env && echo '✅ .env restored from Desktop master backup' && bash scripts/restart.sh ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited — no changes made.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled — .env unchanged.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [RO] 📜 LIVE TAIL — Narration Events (narration.jsonl)
tasks.command: tail -f /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN/logs/narration.jsonl | python3 -c "import sys,json; [print(json.dumps(json.loads(l), indent=None)) for l in sys.stdin]" 2>/dev/null || tail -f /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN/logs/narration.jsonl

tasks.label: [RO] 👀 Watch Live — Opens 3 panels side by side
[RO] 🏥 Health Check — Process + broker + narration status
[W] 🔒 Lock All Code — Sets .py/.sh to read-only (chmod 444)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  Set ALL .py and .sh files to read-only (chmod 444).' && echo '  This prevents any code edits until unlocked.' && echo '  Running engine is NOT affected (already in memory).' && echo '  NO code content is changed — only file permissions.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) find /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN -name '*.py' ! -path '*/logs/*' -exec chmod 444 {} \; && find /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN -name '*.sh' ! -path '*/logs/*' -exec chmod 444 {} \; && echo '✅ All .py and .sh files locked to read-only (444)' ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited — no changes made.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled — permissions unchanged.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [W] 🔓 Unlock All Code — Sets .py/.sh to writable (chmod 644/755)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  Set ALL .py files to writable (644) and .sh to executable (755).' && echo '  This enables code editing and patching by agents.' && echo '  NO code content is changed — only file permissions.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) find /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN -name '*.py' ! -path '*/logs/*' -exec chmod 644 {} \; && find /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN -name '*.sh' ! -path '*/logs/*' -exec chmod 755 {} \; && echo '✅ All .py and .sh files unlocked (644/755)' ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited — no changes made.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled — permissions unchanged.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [W] 🔍 Reassess Trades — Runs TradeManager cycle (can modify SL on open trades)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  Connect to OANDA and run a full TradeManager cycle.' && echo '  It CAN modify stop-loss levels on open trades using the' && echo '  same green-lock, stagnation, and trailing logic the engine uses.' && echo '  This is the same logic that runs automatically every 60 seconds.' && echo '  NO code or config files are modified.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) .venv/bin/python scripts/reassess_trades.py ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited — no changes made.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled — no reassessment run.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [RO] 📊 System Status — All Features ON/OFF Dashboard
